title: Kids Water Bottle 400ml – BPA-Free Plastic with Easy-Grip Rubber, Flip Straw & Carry Handle – Leakproof Sports Bottle for School, Travel, and Outdoor Use (PURPLE)
features: Kid-Friendly Size – 400ml capacity, perfect for school, playtime, and travel.
Leakproof Design – Secure screw-top lid with a foldable straw prevents spills and keeps straw clean.
Comfort Grip – Rubberised middle section makes it easy for little hands to hold.
Portable & Lightweight – Built-in handle for effortless carrying on the go.
Safe & Durable – Made from BPA-free plastic. Hand wash only. Not suitable for hot liquids.
description: Keep kids hydrated wherever they go with this 400ml sport water bottle designed just for little hands. Crafted from BPA-free plastic with a soft rubber grip for easy holding, this bottle features a foldable straw to help prevent spills and keep the mouthpiece clean. The secure screw-top lid and built-in carry handle make it ideal for school bags, lunchboxes, and outdoor adventures. Available in a selection of fun pastel colours, it’s both stylish and practical. Durable and lightweight, it’s perfect for daily use—just hand wash after each adventure. Not suitable for hot liquids. A must-have for on-the-go hydration!
